svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="p1c6VzZRCQT7bo49u8MN"> <mxGraphModel dx="1289" dy="861" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title WearItRight - Class Diagram
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle

package \"Identity and Access\" {
	class User {
		+id: UUID
		+email: string
		+passwordHash: string
		+status: AccountStatus
		+createdAt: datetime
		+lastLoginAt: datetime
		+register()
		+deleteAccount()
	}

	class Role {
		+id: UUID
		+name: RoleType
	}

	class UserSession {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+accessToken: string
		+expiresAt: datetime
		+isActive: bool
		+invalidate()
	}

	class PasswordResetToken {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+token: string
		+expiresAt: datetime
		+usedAt: datetime
		+markUsed()
	}

	class ConsentRecord {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+consentType: ConsentType
		+granted: bool
		+recordedAt: datetime
	}

	class AuthService {
		+register(email, password)
		+login(email, password)
		+logout(sessionId)
		+requestPasswordReset(email)
		+resetPassword(token, newPassword)
		+authorize(userId, role)
	}
}

package \"Profile and Preferences\" {
	class UserPreferences {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+budgetMin: decimal
		+budgetMax: decimal
		+stylePreferences: string[*]
		+preferredColors: string[*]
		+updatedAt: datetime
	}

	class SizeProfile {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+topSize: string
		+bottomSize: string
		+footwearSize: string
	}

	class ExclusionPreferences {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+excludedColors: string[*]
		+excludedPatterns: string[*]
		+excludedCategories: ClothingCategory[*]
	}

	class ProfileService {
		+updatePreferences(userId, data)
		+updateSizes(userId, sizes)
		+updateExclusions(userId, exclusions)
		+getProfile(userId)
	}
}

package \"Context and Recommendation\" {
	class LocationContext {
		+id: UUID
		+source: LocationSource
		+city: string
		+countryCode: string
		+latitude: double
		+longitude: double
		+capturedAt: datetime
	}

	class EventContext {
		+id: UUID
		+eventType: EventType
		+dressCode: DressCode
		+eventTime: EventTime
	}

	class WeatherSnapshot {
		+id: UUID
		+temperatureC: decimal
		+precipitationChance: decimal
		+humidity: decimal
		+windKph: decimal
		+observedAt: datetime
		+expiresAt: datetime
	}

	class RecommendationRequest {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+locationContextId: UUID
		+eventContextId: UUID
		+weatherSnapshotId: UUID
		+requestedAt: datetime
	}

	class OutfitRecommendation {
		+id: UUID
		+requestId: UUID
		+rank: int
		+relevanceScore: decimal
		+estimatedTotalPrice: decimal
	}

	class OutfitItem {
		+id: UUID
		+outfitId: UUID
		+category: ClothingCategory
		+isOptional: bool
	}

	class RecommendationExplanation {
		+id: UUID
		+outfitId: UUID
		+weatherReason: string
		+eventReason: string
	}

	class StyleTip {
		+id: UUID
		+outfitId: UUID
		+tipText: string
	}

	class RecommendationService {
		+generateRecommendations(request): OutfitRecommendation[*]
		+rankRecommendations(recommendations)
		+applyWeatherRules(recommendations, weather)
		+applyExclusions(recommendations, exclusions)
		+regenerate(requestId)
	}
}

package \"Shopping and Comparison\" {
	class ProductItem {
		+id: UUID
		+name: string
		+brand: string
		+category: ClothingCategory
		+color: string
		+imageUrl: string
	}

	class ProductOffer {
		+id: UUID
		+productItemId: UUID
		+providerId: UUID
		+currency: CurrencyCode
		+price: decimal
		+normalizedPrice: decimal
		+inStock: bool
		+productUrl: string
		+lastCheckedAt: datetime
	}

	class ShoppingProvider {
		+id: UUID
		+name: string
		+apiBaseUrl: string
		+isActive: bool
	}

	class ProductMatch {
		+id: UUID
		+outfitItemId: UUID
		+productItemId: UUID
		+matchScore: decimal
	}

	class PriceComparisonResult {
		+id: UUID
		+productItemId: UUID
		+bestOfferId: UUID
		+calculatedAt: datetime
	}

	class ProductQuery {
		+priceMin: decimal
		+priceMax: decimal
		+brand: string
		+size: string
		+color: string
		+store: string
		+sortBy: SortOption
	}

	class ShoppingService {
		+mapOutfitToProducts(outfit): ProductMatch[*]
		+retrieveOffers(matches): ProductOffer[*]
		+normalizeCurrency(offers, targetCurrency)
		+findBestPrice(productItemId): PriceComparisonResult
		+openRetailerPage(offerId)
	}

	class FilterSortService {
		+filterOffers(offers, query): ProductOffer[*]
		+sortOffers(offers, sortBy): ProductOffer[*]
	}
}

package \"Favorites and UX\" {
	class FavoriteOutfit {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+outfitId: UUID
		+savedAt: datetime
	}

	class FavoriteItem {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+offerId: UUID
		+savedAt: datetime
	}

	class FavoritesService {
		+saveOutfit(userId, outfitId)
		+saveItem(userId, offerId)
		+removeOutfit(userId, outfitId)
		+removeItem(userId, offerId)
		+listFavorites(userId)
	}

	class FeedbackService {
		+showLoading(context)
		+showError(code, message)
		+showFallbackGuidance(context)
	}
}

package \"Operations and Quality\" {
	class AuditLog {
		+id: UUID
		+userId: UUID
		+eventType: AuditEventType
		+correlationId: string
		+eventData: json
		+createdAt: datetime
	}

	class MetricSample {
		+id: UUID
		+name: string
		+value: decimal
		+tags: json
		+recordedAt: datetime
	}

	class ResiliencePolicy {
		+id: UUID
		+targetSystem: string
		+timeoutMs: int
		+retryCount: int
		+circuitBreakerThreshold: int
	}

	class MonitoringService {
		+recordLatency(name, value)
		+recordError(name, code)
		+checkApiHealth(provider)
		+raiseAlert(metric)
	}
}

package \"External Integrations\" {
	interface WeatherProviderClient {
		+getCurrentWeather(location): WeatherSnapshot
	}

	interface ShoppingProviderClient {
		+searchProducts(query): ProductOffer[*]
		+getAvailability(productId): bool
	}

	interface EmailClient {
		+sendPasswordReset(email, token)
	}

	class WeatherApiAdapter
	class ShoppingApiAdapter
	class EmailAdapter
}

enum RoleType {
	USER
	ADMIN
}

enum AccountStatus {
	ACTIVE
	SUSPENDED
	DELETED
}

enum ConsentType {
	GEOLOCATION
	PRIVACY_POLICY
	TERMS_OF_USE
}

enum LocationSource {
	MANUAL
	GEOLOCATION
}

enum EventType {
	CASUAL
	BUSINESS
	FORMAL
	OUTDOOR
	PARTY
	DATE
}

enum DressCode {
	SMART_CASUAL
	BUSINESS_FORMAL
	BLACK_TIE
	NONE
}

enum EventTime {
	DAY
	NIGHT
}

enum ClothingCategory {
	TOP
	BOTTOM
	FOOTWEAR
	ACCESSORY
	OUTERWEAR
}

enum CurrencyCode {
	USD
	EUR
	GBP
	ZAR
}

enum SortOption {
	RELEVANCE
	PRICE_ASC
	PRICE_DESC
	NEWEST
}

enum AuditEventType {
	LOGIN
	LOGOUT
	PASSWORD_RESET
	RECOMMENDATION_REQUEST
	ACCOUNT_DELETION
	ROLE_CHANGE
}

' Identity relationships
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" UserSession
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" PasswordResetToken
User \"1\" -- \"1..*\" Role
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" ConsentRecord
AuthService ..> User
AuthService ..> PasswordResetToken
AuthService ..> UserSession

' Profile relationships
User \"1\" -- \"1\" UserPreferences
User \"1\" -- \"1\" SizeProfile
User \"1\" -- \"1\" ExclusionPreferences
ProfileService ..> UserPreferences
ProfileService ..> SizeProfile
ProfileService ..> ExclusionPreferences

' Recommendation relationships
RecommendationRequest \"1\" -- \"1\" LocationContext
RecommendationRequest \"1\" -- \"1\" EventContext
RecommendationRequest \"1\" -- \"1\" WeatherSnapshot
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" RecommendationRequest
RecommendationRequest \"1\" -- \"3..*\" OutfitRecommendation
OutfitRecommendation \"1\" -- \"3..*\" OutfitItem
OutfitRecommendation \"1\" -- \"1\" RecommendationExplanation
OutfitRecommendation \"1\" -- \"1..*\" StyleTip
RecommendationService ..> RecommendationRequest
RecommendationService ..> OutfitRecommendation
RecommendationService ..> ExclusionPreferences

' Shopping relationships
OutfitItem \"1\" -- \"0..*\" ProductMatch
ProductMatch \"1\" -- \"1\" ProductItem
ProductItem \"1\" -- \"1..*\" ProductOffer
ProductOffer \"*\" -- \"1\" ShoppingProvider
ProductItem \"1\" -- \"0..1\" PriceComparisonResult
ShoppingService ..> ProductMatch
ShoppingService ..> ProductOffer
FilterSortService ..> ProductOffer

' Favorites relationships
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" FavoriteOutfit
User \"1\" -- \"0..*\" FavoriteItem
FavoriteOutfit \"*\" -- \"1\" OutfitRecommendation
FavoriteItem \"*\" -- \"1\" ProductOffer
FavoritesService ..> FavoriteOutfit
FavoritesService ..> FavoriteItem

' Operations relationships
AuditLog \"*\" -- \"0..1\" User
MonitoringService ..> MetricSample
ShoppingService ..> ResiliencePolicy
MonitoringService ..> ShoppingProvider
RecommendationService ..> AuditLog
AuthService ..> AuditLog

' Integration relationships
WeatherApiAdapter ..|> WeatherProviderClient
ShoppingApiAdapter ..|> ShoppingProviderClient
EmailAdapter ..|> EmailClient
RecommendationService ..> WeatherProviderClient
ShoppingService ..> ShoppingProviderClient
AuthService ..> EmailClient

note right of RecommendationService
	Covers FR-09..FR-14 and low-level recommendation behavior:
	context-driven generation, ranking, exclusions,
	weather rules, explanation, and confidence tips.
end note

note right of ShoppingService
	Covers FR-17..FR-22 and shopping low-level requirements:
	multi-provider retrieval, best-price comparison,
	stock handling, filtering, and sorting.
end note

note bottom of MonitoringService
	Supports non-functional requirements for
	observability, reliability, and performance tracking.
end note

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="CSTFSE6Sx-oJ1SF90R3_-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1258" width="7253" x="30" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
